Notice Of Hearing And Motion
Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kathleen L. Morgan, Esq. of the LAW OFFICE OF KATHLEEN L. MORGAN, T:415.994.1342, for petitioner/ moving party;
Neha Gupta, Esq., CCSF Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.4665, for respondent.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court decided to look at the authorities cited by the parties at the hearing and,

PETITIONER JENNIFER GALARZA's Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
